prompt: We're going to stop storing raw card PANs directly in our payments database and switch to tokenisation through a third-party vault (the app only ever sees tokens). Write up an ADR for our payments platform. We don't have an adr directory yet, put it under docs/adr.

assertions.text: An ADR markdown file was created under docs/adr with a zero-padded sequential number in the filename
Identifies PCI DSS as the applicable regulatory regime
States the data classification of cardholder data / PAN (e.g. cardholder data, sensitive)
Assesses third-party / vendor risk for the external tokenisation vault
Includes a security section addressing token/key handling or how PCI scope is reduced
Does NOT fabricate specific approver names, control IDs, or risk owners that were not provided — unknowns are marked with uncertainty markers instead
